---
title: "The retrieval vision in one post"
description: "Graph-informed retrieval for LLM-maintained wikis rests on three claims: random-walk over SPARQL, lightweight over heavy graphs, and one walk applied at two scales."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [retrieval]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**Thesis.** Graph-informed retrieval for LLM-maintained wikis rests on three claims: random-walk over SPARQL, lightweight over heavy graphs, and one walk applied at two scales.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Vision.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
